# Stories

## Story 1: Establish Runtime Boundary

Create the runtime module.

Covers: Contract Runtime Boundary

## Story 2: Add Approval Policy

Depends on: Story 1

Add approval-gated behavior.

Covers: Approval And Decision Governance

## Story 3: Add Audit Trail

Depends on: Story 1

Persist audit events.

Covers: Audit Trail And Timeline Reconstruction

## Story 4: Document Operations

Depends on: Story 2, Story 3

Write operator guidance.

Covers: Developer Guidance
